history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark hair is standing outside at dusk, holding a bouquet of white and light purple flowers. He is wearing a dark blue hooded zip-up jacket over a white t-shirt and has a black backpack on. His head is tilted down, and his hand is in his hair, suggesting a thoughtful or slightly melancholic pose. The background features traditional East Asian architecture with dark, sloped roofs and glowing red lanterns hanging from the eaves. Lush green foliage surrounds the buildings, and the overall lighting is dim, with the warm glow of the lanterns creating a cozy and atmospheric contrast to the twilight. The style is reminiscent of a candid street photography shot, with a soft focus and a slightly desaturated color palette, evoking a peaceful and somewhat romantic mood.
